post.description: Creates a new user account and sends a verification email. The email contains a link to the frontend route '/email/verify/{id}/{hash}?expires={timestamp}&signature={signature}', which the user must click to verify their email address. The frontend then calls 'GET /api/v1/auth/email/verify/{id}/{hash}' to complete the verification.

201.description: User registered successfully. A verification email has been sent.

400.description: Domain validation error (e.g., email already exists, underage user)

post.description: Login endpoint. Note: Only users with user_type='trainer' can login. Students will receive a 403 error.

get.summary: Get authenticated user
Verify email address (redirects to frontend)
get.description: This endpoint is called from the frontend after user clicks the email verification link. The email link points to the frontend route '/email/verify/{id}/{hash}', which then calls this API endpoint. This endpoint validates the signature and redirects back to the frontend with the verification result.

403.description: Invalid or expired signature - Redirects to /verification-failed?reason=invalid

get.summary: Get sets for an exercise in a session

reps.description: Configured number of reps for this set

suggested_weight.description: Suggested weight based on history (null if no history)

is_completed.description: Whether this set has been executed

422.description: Exercise does not belong to session

403.description: Only students can access this endpoint

post.description: Execute a set in a workout session. Validates that set_number exists in routine configuration and that reps_completed matches configured reps. Updates weight history only when weight changes.

set_number.description: Must be a valid set number from routine configuration

reps_completed.description: Must exactly match the configured reps for this set

weight_used.description: Weight used in kg (optional for bodyweight exercises)

422.description: Validation error. Possible errors: (1) Set number doesn't exist in routine, (2) Reps completed don't match configured reps, (3) Set already executed, (4) Session already finished

error.example: El número de serie no existe en la configuración del ejercicio
